[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11000000 2
1 00001110 3
2 00001001 2
3 00000001 1
4 00011110 4
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 00000000 a
